aux.description: Display all processes in BSD-style user-oriented format with terminal and CPU/memory stats

ef.description: Display all processes in full POSIX format with UID, PID, PPID, and command line

sort.description: Sort output by the specified column (prefix with + for ascending, - for descending)

format.description: Specify user-defined output format as a comma-separated list of column keywords

forest.description: Display process hierarchy as an ASCII art tree
